channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nvidia RTX 5090 GPUs are so expensive that Intel's Arc Pro B70 is now a genuine bargain for AI — 128GB 4-card configuration costs less than $3800
item.description: With RTX 5090 prices hovering at or above the $4,000 mark, Intel's value-centric Arc Pro B70 might be the bargain tot fulfill your local AI needs at a fraction of the cost.

item.title: Apple is reportedly planning new iPad Pro and MacBook Pro releases early next year
item.description: Apple is readying several new iPad Pro tablets, and a budget-friendly MacBook Pro, reports suggest.

item.title: This AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 mini PC has 128GB RAM, metal feet, and even a vegan leather handle — because why not?
item.description: MINIX's Ryzen AI mini PC stuffs 128GB RAM, 126 TOPS AI compute, and networking into a chassis built for LLMs.

item.title: The Best July 4 Grill and Griddle Deals: Weber, Traeger, Recteq
item.description: Fourth of July weekend is the last great grill and griddle sale of the summer, including $250 off my favorite pellet smoker.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, July 2 (game #1117)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, July 2 (game #851)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, July 2 (game #1620)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: Apple is reportedly planning a visual refresh of the entry-level MacBook Pro next year
item.description: Next spring could be a fiesta of new iPads, MacBooks and iPhones.

item.title: Bending Spoons defies SaaS slump, surges 40% on first day of trading
item.description: The company has grown rapidly by acquiring and revamping last-generation tech brands like AOL, Eventbrite, Evernote, Meetup, and Vimeo.

item.title: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
item.description: Apple is working on a "revamped" version of its entry-level MacBook Pro that it could launch as soon as the first half of 2027, Bloomberg reports. The company is also testing four new iPad Pros that are set to launch in the spring with a focus on "internal improvements." The updated MacBook Pro, which will […]

item.title: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck
item.description: The co-founders of Bending Spoons, the Italian company quietly buying beloved, ailing Internet brands, learned big lessons from their own startup's failure.

item.title: Plugable 10-in-1 USB-C Hub review: This sleek and durable dock transformed my two-port laptop into a capable desktop workstation
item.description: Boost the connection options for your slimline laptop with this USB hub that will boost your port options to 10, including impressive 2.5GbE Ethernet and HDMI 2.1.
